# animator - SEO + GEO Remediation Playbook

**Target**: https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai
**Backing service**: aicart/manimcat (image `manimcat:df795d0`)
**Source repo (best guess)**: intelli-verse-x/manimcat
**Audit reference**: `reports/animator.md`
**Generated**: 2026-05-17T18:45:00Z
**Generated by**: gastown audits/crew/auditor (firecrawl + claude)

---

## 1. Executive summary

ManimCat is a **minimal CSR SPA (1129 bytes) with Express backend**—empty `<div id="root">`, no meta description, robots.txt returns JSON error due to routing misconfiguration. Similar to qrstudio but using Express instead of nginx. The site has 1/10 LLM-friendliness. Fixes: (1) add Express routes for robots.txt/sitemap.xml, (2) enhance HTML shell with metadata and schemas, (3) add security headers, (4) migrate to SSR (Next.js) for long-term SEO success. Projected impact: 1/10 → 5/10 with quick fixes; 1/10 → 8/10 with SSR migration.

## 2. Current state recap

From `reports/animator.md`: CSR-only SPA, missing all SEO essentials. Express routing returns JSON error for `/robots.txt`. See full details in audit report.

## 3. 2026 best-practice baseline

Same as `remediation/qrstudio.md` section 3—CSR SPAs underperform for SEO/GEO without SSR.

## 4. Concrete remediation (prioritized)

### Phase 1: Immediate fixes (Express server)

### 1. Add Express routes for robots.txt and sitemap.xml

- **Priority**: P0 (CRITICAL) — estimated 30 minutes
- **What**: Fix JSON error by adding explicit routes
- **Where**: `manimcat/server.js` or `src/server.js`
- **How**:

```javascript
// manimcat/server.js (or app.js)
const express = require('express');
const app = express();

// Serve robots.txt
app.get('/robots.txt', (req, res) => {
  res.type('text/plain');
  res.send(`User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai/sitemap.xml`);
});

// Serve sitemap.xml
app.get('/sitemap.xml', (req, res) => {
  res.type('application/xml');
  res.send(`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
  <url>
    <loc>https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai/</loc>
    <lastmod>2026-05-17</lastmod>
    <changefreq>weekly</changefreq>
    <priority>1.0</priority>
  </url>
</urlset>`);
});

// Serve llms.txt
app.get('/llms.txt', (req, res) => {
  res.type('text/plain');
  res.send(`# ManimCat

> Mathematical animation tool powered by Manim engine. Create educational math visualizations and animated explanations.

[Homepage](https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai): Animation platform overview`);
});

// Static files and SPA fallback
app.use(express.static('public'));
app.get('*', (req, res) => {
  res.sendFile(__dirname + '/public/index.html');
});

app.listen(3000);
```

- **Verify**:
```bash
curl -sS https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai/robots.txt | head -3
# Expected: "User-agent: *" (not JSON error)
```

### 2. Enhance index.html metadata

- **Priority**: P0 (CRITICAL) — estimated 1 hour
- **Where**: `manimcat/public/index.html`
- **How**:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>ManimCat | Mathematical Animation Tool - Create Math Visualizations</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Create beautiful mathematical animations and visualizations with ManimCat, powered by the Manim animation engine. Educational content creation for math and science.">
    
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai/">
    
    <meta property="og:title" content="ManimCat | Mathematical Animation Tool">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Create mathematical animations and visualizations with Manim engine.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://animator.intelli-verse-x.ai/">
    
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="ManimCat | Mathematical Animation Tool">
    
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "SoftwareApplication",
      "name": "ManimCat",
      "applicationCategory": "DesignApplication",
      "description": "Mathematical animation tool powered by Manim engine for creating educational visualizations.",
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "price": "0",
        "priceCurrency": "USD"
      },
      "featureList": [
        "Mathematical animation creation",
        "Manim engine integration",
        "Educational visualization tools",
        "Export animations as video"
      ]
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="root"></div>
</body>
</html>
```

### 3. Add security headers via Express middleware

- **Priority**: P1 — estimated 30 minutes
- **Where**: `manimcat/server.js`
- **How**:

```javascript
// Add before routes
app.use((req, res, next) => {
  res.setHeader('Strict-Transport-Security', 'max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains');
  res.setHeader('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  res.setHeader('X-Frame-Options', 'SAMEORIGIN');
  res.setHeader('Referrer-Policy', 'no-referrer-when-downgrade');
  res.setHeader('Content-Security-Policy', "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';");
  next();
});
```

---

### Phase 2: SSR migration (long-term)

Same as `remediation/qrstudio.md` section 4, step 7. Migrate to Next.js for server-rendered content.

## 5. Stack-aware notes

**Express + React SPA architecture**. Unlike qrstudio (nginx), this uses Node.js Express server, making it easier to add routes but also a candidate for Next.js migration (both use Node.js).

## 6. Verification plan

Same as `remediation/qrstudio.md` section 6.

## 7. Open questions / blockers

1. **Is manimcat a wrapper around Manim Python library?** If so, how does the frontend interact with backend (API calls, WebSocket)?
2. **What is the target audience?** Educators? Students? Researchers? This affects content strategy.

## 8. Estimated impact

**Phase 1**: 1/10 → 5/10 LLM-friendliness, +10-20% traffic
**Phase 2** (SSR): 1/10 → 8/10 LLM-friendliness, +50-100% traffic

Full details same as `remediation/qrstudio.md` section 8.
